expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to Mode 5 (Regression) based on 'regression' keyword
Agent collects git diff for the specified range
Agent identifies changed functions and their call sites
Agent assesses risk factors: complexity increase, hot path change, data structure change, I/O pattern change, memory allocation
Agent presents regression risk matrix with per-function risk assessment
Agent recommends specific benchmark targets before merging
Agent traces all risk assessments to specific code changes
